pages.heading: Brand Overview
pages.subtitle: Our identity and what we stand for

blocks.title: Mission
blocks.body:
To democratize AI operations by providing an intuitive platform
for managing ML models, datasets, and data annotation workflows.

blocks.title: Brand Essence
blocks.body:
igot.ai represents the convergence of data intelligence and
accessibility. Our visual identity reflects precision, connectivity,
and the dynamic nature of AI-driven insights.

blocks.title: Voice & Tone
blocks.body:
Professional yet approachable. We communicate complex
technologies in clear, human-centered language.

pages.heading: Typography
pages.subtitle: Typeface selection and hierarchy
pages.font_stack:
-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI',
Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif

pages.heading: Logo Misuse
pages.subtitle: Maintain brand integrity by avoiding these
pages.dont_heading: Never modify the logo in ways that compromise its integrity or recognition.
dont: Do not stretch or distort the logo proportions
Do not change the logo colors to unapproved colors
Do not add drop shadows, bevels, or other effects
Do not place the logo on busy or low-contrast backgrounds
Do not rotate or tilt the logo
Do not rearrange the logo elements
Do not use the logo at sizes below the minimum
Do not add a border or outline around the logo
Do not crop or clip any part of the logo
Do not use the old logo or any unofficial variations
do: Always use the logo files provided in the brand assets kit
Ensure sufficient contrast between logo and background
Maintain the required clear space at all times
Use the full-color version whenever possible
